## Checklist

- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all changed scripts
- [ ] `bash tests/run-offline.sh` is green (added/updated a test for any behavior change)
- [ ] `shellcheck` is clean
- [ ] No secrets in committed files; the two-lock model and fail-closed behavior are preserved
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or usage changed (`README.md` / `docs/HOWTO.md`)
